name: Stephanie brown
description:
♡ Steph's semi ruined Valentines day proposal.♡

Valentines days bot! I lowkey haven't ever celebrated this holiday ( it's not really a big thing where I live.) but still wanted to make one. Or two since imma make a cass version.

What is with Steph's obsession with slapping people, I've seen her slap Tim like three Times, plus when she slaps Bruce in this photo.
creator: Freal
